from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/health")
def health_check():
    users = db.query(User).all()
    orders = db.query(Order).filter(Order.status == "pending").all()
    recent_logs = db.query(AuditLog).order_by(AuditLog.created_at.desc()).limit(100).all()
    return jsonify({
        "status": "healthy",
        "user_count": len(users),
        "pending_orders": len(orders),
        "recent_activity": len(recent_logs),
    })

@app.route("/ready")
def readiness_check():
    products = db.query(Product).filter(Product.stock > 0).all()
    sessions = db.query(Session).filter(Session.active == True).all()
    return jsonify({
        "ready": True,
        "available_products": len(products),
        "active_sessions": len(sessions),
    })
